description: Invite workspace members to a Slack channel via conversations.invite (POST). Pass user_ids (U…) and/or usergroup_id (S… from slack_list_user_groups); a user group is expanded with usergroups.users.list. Slack allows at most 100 user IDs per call—this tool does not batch; if the combined list exceeds 100, the call fails.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. C… or G… for a private channel the bot can access).

user_ids.description: Slack member user IDs to invite. Combined with members from usergroup_id (deduplicated).

usergroup_id.description: Optional Slack user group ID (S…). Current members are loaded via usergroups.users.list and invited together with user_ids.

force.description: Slack conversations.invite force: invite valid users even if some IDs in the list are invalid.
